response.justification: Candidate presents as a Senior/Staff full-stack engineer with roughly 13-16 years of professional experience and broad polyglot skills, but the resume shows no evidence of the Principal/Director-level scope this role requires: no AI/ML platform or product leadership, no advanced AI degree, no track record advising strategic customers, and no demonstrated AI products or platforms. Recent mention of MCP and agent tooling is light and recent, falling well short of recognized AI expertise expected at this level.
strengths: Long, varied engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Founder of an open-source platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and end-to-end ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product, platform, or research track record expected for an AI-strategy Principal role
Career level (Senior/Staff IC) and scope are below Director-level individual contributor expectations
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or driving cross-org technical strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / AI products built
Seniority and strategic-influence scope below Principal/Director IC
Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience
